message:
fix(db,tools): clippy lints and dead code cleanup

- queries: replace 3 instances of 'if let Some(_) = sanitized' with
  'if sanitized.is_some()' to satisfy clippy redundant_pattern_matching

- reservations: remove dead _paths_ref allocation from incomplete refactor
  — glob-resolved IDs are now passed directly, making this binding unused

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
